_note: Kenya tax obligations. Source: KRA, Finance Act 2023-2025. Updated 2026-03-29.

turnover_tax.name: Turnover Tax (TOT)
turnover_tax.description: Simplified tax for small businesses. 3% of gross turnover.

vat.name: Value Added Tax (VAT)
vat.description: Tax on supply of goods and services. Must register when turnover exceeds KES 8M.
vat.etims_note: All VAT-registered businesses must issue eTIMS invoices from 2024

paye.name: Pay As You Earn (PAYE)
paye.description: Tax deducted from employee salaries by employer.

income_tax_resident.name: Income Tax (Resident Individual)
income_tax_resident.description: Annual tax on total income for individuals not on TOT.
income_tax_resident.filing_deadline_note: 30 June of the following year. E.g. 2025 income filed by 30 June 2026.

income_tax_corporate.name: Income Tax (Corporate)
income_tax_corporate.description: Tax on company profits. Resident companies: 30%. Newly listed companies on NSE: 25% for 5 years.
income_tax_corporate.filing_deadline_note: 6th month after end of accounting period

withholding_tax.name: Withholding Tax (WHT)
withholding_tax.description: Tax deducted at source on certain payments: dividends, interest, rent, professional fees.

presumptive_tax.name: Presumptive Tax
presumptive_tax.description: Lump-sum tax for businesses with turnover below KES 1M. Payable on business permit renewal.
presumptive_tax.filing_deadline_note: Payable when renewing single business permit at county level

residential_rental_income.name: Residential Rental Income Tax (MRI)
residential_rental_income.description: Simplified tax on residential rental income between KES 288K and KES 15M per year.

nssf.name: NSSF (National Social Security Fund)
nssf.description: Social security contribution. Employer and employee each contribute.

excise_duty.name: Excise Duty
excise_duty.description: Tax on specific manufactured goods and services (alcohol, tobacco, betting, financial services).

digital_service_tax.name: Digital Service Tax (DST)
digital_service_tax.description: 1.5% on gross transaction value of digital services provided in Kenya by non-residents. Repealed for residents — now under normal income tax.
digital_service_tax.note: Residents: DST repealed from Jan 2025. Digital income taxed under normal IT.
